segment.source: Renders a two-column hero pairing eyebrow, headline, lead text, and a primary button with an embedded video panel (YouTube nocookie or Vimeo iframe URL) plus optional video title and rich-text caption. Use it for: page openers led by a product demo, trailer, keynote, or explainer video. Prefer 'Video Embed' for a standalone video within page content; 'Video Feature Section' for a mid-page feature built around a video.
